stemHtml: Due to variations in the actual passenger distribution, cargo loading, or fuel distribution in comparison with the data used during the pre-flight preparation of the mass and balance documentation, the Operator (1) _____ which is/are (2) _____ restrictive than the certified CG limits.

options.b: (1) applies a CG margin of 15%; (2) less
options.d: (1) applies a CG margin of 15%; (2) more
